top_signals.title: Germany Coalition Set to Pursue 40% Stake in Tank-Maker KNDS
top_signals.summary: Germany’s ruling coalition decided to take a 40% stake in KNDS NV before the tankmaker’s planned initial public offering this summer, people with knowledge of the matter said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
